title: Reopenable Transformation Geometry
canonical_statement: Adaptive viability depends on whether recoverable future transformation remains accessible.

T_plus.name: Transformational Accessibility Structure
T_plus.definition: Defines what transformational futures are survivably reachable.

Omega_reopen.name: Transformational Reopenability Measure
Omega_reopen.definition: Defines which reachable transformations preserve recoverable continuity.

core_distinctions.movement_is_not_viability: A system may continue transforming while losing regenerative reopenability.
core_distinctions.reachability_is_not_reopenability: A future state may be reachable without preserving recoverable continuation.
core_distinctions.existence_is_not_adaptive_persistence: Physical or structural continuation does not imply accessible recoverable transformation.

one_sentence_lock: Adaptive viability depends on whether recoverable future transformation remains accessible.
